title: Async StringOrBuffer RAB input can be resized before worker read
unsafe_operation: StringOrBuffer::from_js_maybe_async_into(...) captures JS-backed BufferSource input for later async StringOrBuffer::slice() worker reads
invariant: Async workers must not read bytes from caller-controlled resizable ArrayBuffer storage after the JS-visible buffer can be resized or detached
safe_caller: crypto.scrypt, crypto.pbkdf2, Bun.zstdCompress, or Bun.zstdDecompress with a resizable ArrayBuffer-backed BufferSource input resized before async completion
fix_options: Snapshot or copy resizable/growable ArrayBuffer-backed bytes into stable owned storage before async worker scheduling
Keep the first implementation slice focused on the non-encoded StringOrBuffer::from_js_maybe_async_into helper boundary
Preserve existing protect/unprotect ownership for fixed Buffer and string inputs while changing only the RAB/SAB-stale input path
do_not_touch: Do not bundle node:fs writeFile or appendFile copy-back semantics into this helper slice
Do not rewrite JSTranspiler or JSBundler paths; prior scout evidence treated them as owned-copy controls
Do not claim Node parity, UB proof, Miri-clean status, or analyzer discovery from this manual packet

evidence.summary: Manual route pins the shared async StringOrBuffer helper at line 402, crypto async captures at node_crypto_binding.rs lines 766 and 786, and zstd async worker reads at BunObject.rs line 2884
evidence.limitation: source trace only; does not prove a resizable backing store reaches the worker or that a witness executed this site

evidence.summary: External Bun scout matrix reported ASAN or runtime stale-input failures for async crypto and zstd StringOrBuffer inputs after RAB resize
evidence.limitation: runtime route evidence only; not memory-safety proof, not UB proof, and not analyzer-discovered

evidence.summary: Miri model covers the stale span shape outside the Bun runtime, where a saved pointer/length pair is read after backing storage changes
evidence.limitation: model evidence only; does not prove the Bun site executed under Miri or that every StringOrBuffer async caller shares the same fix

trust_boundary: manual candidate; not analyzer-discovered; not proof of repository safety
